supersededReason: Release ceremony did not upload assets to the GitHub Release before v4.299.0 shipped. v4.299.0 carries all v4.298.0 changes plus the regenerated asset manifest.
changelog: New unit-test suite `scripts/__tests__/check-vi-func.test.mjs` (10 cases) that exercises the Node-native `vi.func` scanner across passing and failing fixtures: `vi.fn` acceptance, `vi.func` detection with file:line reporting, multi-hit reporting across files, word-boundary safety (`vifunc`, `vi_func`, `xvi.func`), skip lists (`node_modules`, `dist`, `.github/workflows/`, `.gitmap/`, `changelog.md`), non-source extension filtering (`.txt`, `.png`), and markdown/yaml matches.

`scripts/check-vi-func.mjs` now accepts `--root <dir>` so tests can point it at temporary fixtures instead of the repo root. Added the new test file to `SKIP_FILES` so its literal `vi.func` fixtures do not trip the scanner on real runs.
